description.en: Crystal-clear beads with icy shine. Minimal silhouette, elegant finish.

description.en: Soft pink beaded texture. Compact and refined.
description.kz: Жұмсақ қызғылт текстура. Ықшам әрі әдемі.

description.en: White mini bag with pearl finish. Lightweight and versatile.
